summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens show device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name
description_clean: Onboarding screens display the device code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name for the Falcon device.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app
Begin the onboarding flow for a new device
Observe the device name displayed on the onboarding screens
expected: Onboarding screens display the proper product name for the Falcon device (e.g., "Poly Voyager Free 20" or the correct retail name).
actual: Onboarding screens display the internal code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name.
